title: Mekreate
description: Simple modpack that includes Mekanism and Create
body:
# Mekreate - A Technical Minecraft Modpack

**Mekreate** is a kitchen sink modpack designed for players who enjoy technical Minecraft but want to skip the early-game grind. It brings together a variety of tech mods, with a focus on **Create** and **Mekanism**, to provide an immersive and fun experience for all players who love automating, building, and exploring.

> **Client Modpack Status:** Work in Progress (WIP)
>
> **Server Modpack Status:** Working so far using a docker container to pull the modpack on start

## Features

- **Tech-focused gameplay**: Experience mods like **Create** and **Mekanism**, which allow for advanced automation, power generation, and factory-building.
- **No early-game grind**: Skip the tedium of early game progression and jump straight into the fun with powerful tools and machines.
- **Variety of mods**: A diverse range of mods is included to offer multiple ways of building and progressing through the game.

## Current Modlist

Here is the full list of mods included in the pack:

### Core Mods
- [**Create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/LNytGWDc) by simibubi
- [**Mekanism**](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ce6I4WUE) by Aidancbrady, Thommy101, Thiakil, pupnewfster, dizzyd

### Storage and Automation
- [**Applied Energistics 2**](https://modrinth.com/mod/XxWD5pD3) by Team AppliedEnergistics
- [**AE2 Extra Channel Modes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mCof3NF5) by Aresiel
- [**AE2 QoL Recipes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/K7VSm2YY) by Christofmeg, Lafen99
- [**AE2WTLib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/pNabrMMw) by mari_023, Ridanisaurus
- [**Mekanism Unleashed**](https://modrinth.com/mod/IZciqufR) by WhitePhantom
- [**Mekanism: Additions**](https://modrinth.com/mod/a6F3uASn) by Aidancbrady, Thommy101, Thiakil, pupnewfster, dizzyd
- [**Mekanism: Generators**](https://modrinth.com/mod/OFVYKsAk) by Aidancbrady, Thommy101, Thiakil, pupnewfster, dizzyd
- [**Mekanism: Tools**](https://modrinth.com/mod/tqQpq1lt) by Aidancbrady, Thommy101, Thiakil, pupnewfster, dizzyd

### Quality of Life
- [**AppleSkin**](https://modrinth.com/mod/EsAfCjCV) by squeek
- [**Ferrite Core**](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs) by malte0811
- [**Just Enough Items (JEI)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/u6dRKJwZ) by mezz
- [**Sophisticated Backpacks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/TyCTlI4b) by P3pp3rF1y, Ridanisaurus
- [**Traveler's Backpack**](https://modrinth.com/mod/rlloIFEV) by Tiviacz1337

### Exploration and World Building
- [**Create: Easy Structures**](https://modrinth.com/mod/z69Pxatv) by Ma_Do
- [**Create: Vibrant Vaults**](https://modrinth.com/mod/hddN8ksR) by ZLT
- [**Create: Trimmed**](https://modrinth.com/mod/zvaHXgQz) by TorNato
- [**Create: Ultimate Factory**](https://modrinth.com/mod/N9QToVpw) by robinfrt

### Power & Energy
- [**Powah**](https://modrinth.com/mod/KZO4S4DO) by owmii, Technici4n, shartte
- [**RFToolsBase**](https://modrinth.com/mod/hIO8IsD8) by McJty
- [**RFToolsBuilder**](https://modrinth.com/mod/e0IclJLr) by McJty
- [**RFToolsPower**](https://modrinth.com/mod/YWbLuPa1) by McJty
- [**RFToolsUtility**](https://modrinth.com/mod/7n3HbHSE) by McJty

### Miscellaneous
- [**Gravestone Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/RYtXKJPr) by Max Henkel
- [**No Chat Reports**](https://modrinth.com/mod/qQyHxfxd) by Aizistral
- [**Xaero's Minimap**](https://modrinth.com/mod/1bokaNcj) by xaero96
- [**Xaero's World Map**](https://modrinth.com/mod/NcUtCpym) by xaero96

## Features

- **Create** for building intricate factories.
- **Mekanism** for advanced energy generation and industrial tools.
- **AE2** for complex storage and item management systems.
- **Sophisticated Backpacks** and **Traveler's Backpack** for a more convenient inventory system.
- Many more to discover!

## Removed / Replaced Mods

These mods have been removed due to copyright or issues with compatability.

- [**~~FTB Essentials~~**](https://www.curseforge.com/projects/410811) by FTB Team
- [**~~FTB Ultimine~~**](https://www.curseforge.com/projects/386134) by FTB Team

---

Enjoy your technical Minecraft experience with **Mekreate**! Happy building and automating!
